description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light beige finish, featuring a flat top surface suitable for writing or placing objects. The left side of the desk has a single drawer above an open cubby shelf, while the right side contains three vertically stacked drawers, each with a rectangular handle. The central area beneath the desktop is open, providing legroom for a seated user. The back of the desk is plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall design is functional and minimal, with clean lines and a utilitarian appearance. The desk is likely constructed from engineered wood or particleboard, with metal or plastic handles on the drawers.
description: A light beige wooden desk with four drawers and an open cubby, featuring a flat top and clean, functional lines. The right side has three stacked drawers, while the left side has one drawer above an open shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four drawers, the open cubby on the left, and the central leg space.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the three stacked drawers protruding slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back and the open cubby structure on the left.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the single drawer above the open cubby and the desk's overall depth.
